name: EPC works tender mandatory sections
triggerCondition: Contract type = EPC AND category = Works/EPC
validationLogic: Tender draft must contain Scope of Work, Technical Specifications, Design Criteria, Schedule of Payments, GCC, SCC, Contract Forms.
suggestedFix: Insert placeholder sections and assign to technical officer for content.

name: Technical Specifications cannot be AI-finalised
triggerCondition: Section = Technical Specifications AND uploadedTechnicalInput = false AND historicalTemplateSelected = false
validationLogic: AI may structure and validate completeness, but cannot finalise project-specific engineering content without department-approved input.
suggestedFix: Display locked banner; route to Technical Officer Approval queue.

name: Similar Work requirement completeness
validationLogic: Similar Work clause must define project type, lookback period, value threshold and evidence documents (completion certificate).
suggestedFix: Insert standard Similar Work template and confirm scope-specific definition.

name: Available Bid Capacity must include formula and definitions
validationLogic: Tender must include formula A*N*3-B with definitions of A (max work in any year), N (completion years), B (current commitments).
suggestedFix: Insert standard bid capacity clause and definitions.

name: JV / Consortium clause completeness
validationLogic: Tender must include JV agreement requirement, lead member condition, joint and several liability and validity through defect liability period.
suggestedFix: Insert standard JV clause from rulebook.

name: Corrigendum changes must propagate
validationLogic: Every changed item must be reflected in ITT, TDS, QR, evaluation statement and bid evaluation rules.
suggestedFix: Run Corrigendum Analyzer and update dependent sections.

name: Bid submission mode consistency
validationLogic: Bid submission mode in tender must not contradict the eProcurement portal's submission requirements (no hard-copy where portal requires online).
suggestedFix: Replace hard-copy mode references with online submission mode.

name: Eligibility criteria must map to evidence forms
validationLogic: Every eligibility criterion must map to a corresponding form or evidence document in Tender Forms.
suggestedFix: Add missing evidence forms or remove unsupported criteria.

name: AI-generated legal/financial/eligibility/technical content needs officer approval
triggerCondition: Source = AI Suggestion AND category in (Legal, Financial, Eligibility, Technical)
validationLogic: Such content must be flagged 'Officer approval required' before inclusion.
suggestedFix: Mark sections requiring officer review and disable publication until approval.

name: Abnormally low bid additional security
triggerCondition: Bid amount more than 25% below internal benchmark
validationLogic: Compute additionalSecurity = (75% of internalBenchmarkValue) - bidAmount and require it as Performance Security top-up.
suggestedFix: Append additional security calculation to award letter and seek officer approval.
